subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God that ye have attained unto the splendrous rays of the Sun of Truth, which, at the behest of the Lord of all beings, hath shone forth from the supreme horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله بانوار آفتاب حقیقت که از افق اعلی بامر مالک وری مشرقست فائزید و از
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
